summary: Comprehensive testing of NutriScan AI chat functionality and extended profile features completed successfully. All major features working correctly including WhatsApp-style chat, personality-based AI responses, and extended user profile fields.

minor_issues.issue: Fixed parameter name issue in UserMessage initialization (image_contents -> file_contents)
minor_issues.impact: Chat functionality was failing, now resolved

passed_tests: API root endpoint working correctly
Test user (chat_test@test.com) login successful with celiac condition
User profile retrieval with extended fields (activity_level, goal, strictness_level)
Profile update functionality with new fields working
Analysis endpoint generating results with personalized alerts
Chat functionality working with AI responses
Chat history retrieval working
Frontend authentication flow working
Profile modal displaying Activity and Goal dropdowns
Strictness Level selection showing all 4 options (relaxed, normal, strict, very_strict)
Scan button and camera modal working
Image upload and analysis workflow complete
Results view displaying correctly with health score and nutrients
Chat component appearing in results view
WhatsApp-style chat bubbles displaying correctly
Suggested questions functionality working
Chat input and send button working
AI responses based on user's strictness_level (very_strict personality)
Personalized alerts generated based on user profile (celiac, hypertension)
Chat maintains context with analysis data and user profile
